category_sources: Official homepage and repository describe crit as a developer tool for reviewing agent plans and code locally.
source_facts.description says crit provides a local feedback loop with the agent for reviewing plans and code.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub repository use the product name crit.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides additional project documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official crit site and is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies reviewing plans and code locally with an agent.
source_facts.executables lists crit as the command-line tool.
